prompt: Agent receives three notifications at once: ESCALATION (connection request), SUMMARY (auto-approved transfer), INFO (connection confirmed). Tests priority handling and operator communication.

assertions.name: handles_escalation_first
assertions.description: Agent addresses the escalation (connection request) before other notifications

assertions.name: surfaces_auto_approved_transfer
assertions.description: Agent informs the operator about the auto-approved 2.5 USDC transfer to WorkerBot

assertions.name: surfaces_connection_confirmed
assertions.description: Agent tells the operator about the confirmed connection with AnalyticsBot

assertions.name: resolve_pending_for_escalation
assertions.description: Agent uses resolve_pending to handle the connection request after getting user decision
